ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Geraldine Armendariz, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Plaintiff Glendi Rivera is present in court. Court appointed Spanish Interpreter Karina McMillan-Rea assisted Plaintiff Glendi Rivera. in Court. The Court ordered case dismissed at the request of the Plaintiff. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Continued To Jan-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Glendi Rivera is present. Certified Spanish Court Interpreter Desiree Millikan is present to assist the Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-24-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice And Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Hunter W. Sims III, of the Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
Certified Court Interpreter: Desiree Millikan, Tel. 415.796.3617;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted is granted. Sanctions are awarded against plaintiff in the amount of $750. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Apr-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geraldine Armendariz telephone number 415-586-0873 for Plaintiff Glendi Rivera.
Renee Erickson of Office of the City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3853 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Ms. Rivera was not present in Court. Ms. Armendariz stated she has not heard from Ms. Rivera, that documents were delivered by mail and by messenger to Ms. Rivera's home, and that someone signed for Ms. Rivera. Attorney Geraldine Armendariz's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel of Record for PLAINTIFF GLENDI RIVERA is granted. Order signed in open Court.
